content.en:
When the Stone of Eternal Night shattered, what was revealed inside was a pure black bead.

Ye Tian took out this bead and felt its energy.

"What a terrifying energy, could it be that this is ......"

Ye Tian thought of an item.

The ultimate treasure!

This bead is most likely the ultimate treasure, and the conditions for the birth of the ultimate treasure are extremely harsh, this fallen ultimate realm master should have cultivated this ultimate treasure in the abyss of eternal night, it took too long, but he still cultivated it.

It's a pity that he has fallen.

"This ultimate treasure is called the Pearl of the Eternal Night!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he began to study the Pearl of the Eternal Night.

After some time, he had a general idea of the effects of the Orb of the Eternal Night.

First of all, the Orb of the Night, like the Stone of the Night, can help you understand the ultimate rules of the Night, but the Orb of the Night is more than that.

It also amplifies his combat power, allowing him to wield more of the power of the Eternal Night Ultimate System in battle. 21

There may be other effects, but he hasn't worked out them yet.

For Ye Tian, the Pearl of the Eternal Night helped him a lot, it could help him quickly comprehend the ultimate rules of the eternal night, which was much better than the stone of the eternal night, and it could also improve his thinking comprehension, and it was also very helpful to use it to comprehend other ultimate rules.

Therefore, Ye Tian used the Pearl of Eternal Night to comprehend the ultimate rules of eternal night in the following days.

Really.

His Eternal Night Ultimate Rule progressed too fast, many times faster than when he had comprehended the Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule before.

The Ultimate Rule of the Tenfold Eternal Night!

Eleven Eternal Night Ultimate Rules!

The Ultimate Rule of the Twelvefold Eternal Night!

As the years passed, Ye Tian's Eternal Night Ultimate Rule was frantically improving, and his strength was also improving.

And as the Eternal Night Ultimate Realm became higher and higher, the degree of control of his Perfection-level Eternal Night Ultimate Body was also constantly improving.

For example, when he just broke through to the Ultimate Realm Lord, the power exerted by his Eternal Night Ultimate Body was 1, then with the improvement of the Eternal Night Ultimate Rule Realm, the power exerted would be 1.1 or even 1.2, and with continuous improvement, it could definitely be increased to more than 10 in the future.

At that time, his strength will be terrifyingly improved!

Before you know it, tens of billions of domain yuan years have passed.

In just such a short period of time, Ye Tian had raised the Eternal Night Ultimate Rule to the thirty-sixfold realm, which was far beyond the Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule.

However, his Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule had also been raised a bit, reaching the fifteenth realm.

As for the other ultimate rules, he didn't go to enlightenment.

And during this period of time, he also combined the Abyss Star Ultimate System and the Eternal Night Ultimate System to create a joint ultimate dimensional killing move - the Eternal Night Abyss Knife!

The grade of this killing move is a little higher than that of the Abyss Spear, and due to Ye Tian's Abyss Star Ultimate Rule and Eternal Night Ultimate Rule, it is extremely high.

Therefore, the Eternal Night Abyss Knife was already the strongest attack that Ye Tian had mastered so far, and there was no one.

In short, for a long time, he didn't need to worry about improving the ultimate rule of the eternal night.

......

Terran.

Today's human race has given birth to many ultimate masters of the Abyssal Star System, and Ye Tian's son, Ye Xingchen, has comprehended the rules of the Abyssal Star Ultimate, and mastered the Abyssal Star Ultimate Body at the Dacheng level.

However, the Ultimate Realm Master of the Yuanxing Ultimate System was occupied by Ye Tian, and Ye Xingchen could only use this Ultimate System as a concurrent cultivation, not as a major cultivation.

Ye Xingchen can choose to take the Transcendental Realm Ultimate System as his major, but this Ultimateness System is relatively ordinary, and it is difficult to find treasures to assist in comprehending the Transcendental Realm's Ultimate Rules.

The ultimate ancient monument is still a little ordinary, and the effect of assisting comprehension is not very good.

Ye Tian was ready to rearrange a major Ultimate System for Ye Xingchen, so that he could also hope to break through to the Ultimate Realm Main Level.

So in the following days, Ye Tian looked for a suitable ultimate system for Ye Xingchen.

And just like that, another period passed.

......

Sea of Dimensions.

Ten Thousand Star Caves.

This is a very remote place in the Sea of Dimensions, and the Ten Thousand Star Caves have no resources, but there is an ultimate system here.

Wanxing Ultimate System!

The Ten Thousand Stars Ultimate System is a special ultimate system condensed by 10,000 kinds of star light, and the advantages of this ultimate system are defense, speed, and attack power.

Ye Tian took a moment to sort out the Wanxing Ultimate System.

Then, Ye Tian brought Ye Xingchen here.

"Xingchen, this is the Ten Thousand Stars Cave, as far as I know, the Ten Thousand Stars Ultimate System has not yet given birth to the Ultimate Realm Master, you are here to comprehend the Ten Thousand Stars Ultimate System, and strive to break through to the Ten Thousand Stars Ultimate System as the Ultimate Realm Master!" Ye Tian suggested.

"Yes, Father!"

Ye Xingchen responded.

In the days that followed, Ye Xingchen stayed in the Wanxing Cave to cultivate the Wanxing Ultimate System, and with Ye Tian's help, all kinds of resources that helped him improve his comprehension were given to him, allowing him to cultivate with all his might.

After a long period of time, Ye Xingchen also comprehended the ultimate rule of ten thousand stars.

At this time.

Ye Tian was still studying how to get out of the black river, if he couldn't get out, he wouldn't be able to bring out the Pearl of Eternal Night.

After his continuous research, he found that the Black River should be a special place in the Tianqu Forbidden Zone, and it was not easy to get out from here.

But he tried many times, and he also found the weak spot here, and if he tore this weak point, he could rush out of the black river.

To do this, he went through 353 attempts.

Ye Tian was finally about to completely cut through the weak point.

"Eternal Night Abyss Knife!"

Ye Tian went all out, cast the Eternal Night Abyss Knife, cut through the weak point with one sword, and escaped in an instant.

......

Outside the Tianqu Forbidden Area.

Ye Tian's replica body came out.

"It really came out!"

Immediately, he changed to a replica body, and hurried with the replica body of the ultimate body, which was faster and safer.

After that, he went to the Ten Thousand Star Cave.

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen saw that Ye Tian was here again and shouted.

"I'll put this thing here, and you can follow along with it, so that you can comprehend the Nine Thousand Stars Ultimate Rule faster!"

Ye Tian took out the Pearl of Eternal Night, and then began to comprehend.

Ye Xingchen saw the Pearl of the Eternal Night and was immediately attracted to it.

"It's ......"

He instantly felt that his thinking had improved many times, and then he seized the time to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Stars.

This pearl of eternal night does not have anything to do with the ultimate rule of ten thousand stars, but it can assist in comprehension and improve thinking comprehension, which is very against the sky.

Not long after, Ye Xingchen successfully comprehended the Ultimate Rule of the Double Ten Thousand Stars with the Pearl of the Eternal Night.

"What a quick comprehension speed!"

Ye Xingchen was excited, he finally saw the hope of breaking through the Ultimate Realm Lord.
